basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. Metallurgy and Materials Engineering/Science. GATE qualification is essential.
qualification.details: B.Tech. Metallurgy and Materials Engineering/Science. GATE qualification is essential.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Roorkee is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.Tech. in Metallurgy and Materials Engineering/Science. Additionally, a valid GATE qualification is mandatory for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all necessary documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post announced by IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment at IIT Roorkee is SRIC/06.
